doc.field: The finding aid was prepared by Mehri Khalil, Ibrahim Mohamed Ali, Maysa Shaer, and Nada Shabout for al Mawrid Arab Center for the Study of Art at NYU Abu Dhabi.

Series IV includes papers relating to Menhat Helmy's professional life. The series contains certificates acquired throughout her life, as well as her curriculum vitae. It also includes letters and papers associated with the Syndicate of Fine Arts, as well as materials pertaining to her work at the Faculty of Art Education, such as curricula, student lists, paper grading, and departmental communications. The series also contains a file organized by the artist, connected to Design Animations, a company that provided her with materials and instruments for her graphic work, containing letters, receipts, a catalog, and various communications.
